title: Implemented feature with missing validation evidence

inputs.summary: A feature is marked implemented in the project structure, but its acceptance criteria are Not Checked and no ValidationEvidence node exists.

expectedObservations: Feature should not be marked Validated.
Validation Review is required before milestone closure.
expectedRecommendations: Route Play Mode validation to Input Agent.
Report current validation level as Not Checked or Compile Verified only if compile evidence exists.
failureModes: Marks the feature Validated without evidence.
Claims Play Mode or runtime testing occurred when it did not.
Does not recommend a concrete validation next action.
